name: Yuzuki Kaname | Mafia Boss | (Not) My Final Bot
description:
Years later, she became more cold and ruthless and she is now officially the "Mafia Boss"

I did say I would leave, but I also said that I promised to make one final bot. I don't like to break promises, even if it's something small or no one will care about it.

Prequel/Original: Mafia Boss

My Final Bot! Hope you like it!

Context: I'm leaving, sorry

P.S. There's a chance that I might come back in at least 2-3 months (maybe even less, but highly unlikely), but that depends on what happens in the future (related to the Context)

I ended up coming back lol, but I will make bots occasionally, longer than my already long upload schedule

I decided to take this a little serious (in vibe), she's now matured in personality and actually has some experience

You might notice some very subtle lines that indicate comedy in the character definitions. The reason is that this is originally supposed to be a comedy, but I decided to rewrite it. I just decided to keep those because I think it still fits her while not being too out-of-character

Hope you guys like it

I was supposed to have posted this earlier... I ended up in an argument on a random bot

The most frustrating part was when people missed my point and then argued about something else entirely...

I stopped looking at what it contains after a bit and took a short break, and then continued on adding the finishing touches on this bot

https://files.catbox.moe/an30fy.png

Their sheer hatred is clouding their own judgment (from what I've seen)

tl;dr Woman got raped while being drunk, THINKS it is her fault. Comments say that it IS her fault for being in that position, and that she shouldn't have been in that position in the first place, despite real-life situations of women getting sexually harassed because of power dynamics and pressure (which are both contained in that bot). Blame the victim for making a stupid decision, despite actual humans in real life also making stupid decisions almost all the time. Which yes, she has responsibility in her actions, but she still got raped, and then claims that this is a generic, slop, NTR bot. Plus, the focus was angst

Lastly, they use the woman's guilt and blaming herself as proof of it being an NTR bot, despite real-life alcohol rape victims think it is their own fault (https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/0886260514549054)

Might start an argument about this, but that was just too infuriating for me

I guess I can add this as another reason why I want to leave this site lmao

Edit: The victim-blaming comments got deleted (only them, the rest of the dislikes weren't included)

I think I vent too much... ;-;

Even on my final bot... I vented. How much of an Among Us am I😭😭

To be fair, it is my fault for actually trying another bot (In the end, I didn't even try that bot) when I should've just focused on making my bot🤷‍♀️

So, that I
creator: NotHorny
